findings.summary: Sage decisions doc §2.3 specifies __all__ = {DispatchResult, TierGate, execute_with_retry} but the shipped __init__.py exposes the two backends (ClaudeSDKBackend, PydanticAIBackend) as well. The canonical runner test uses `<= exported` (subset), so this is a deliberate superset, not a failure — but the Sage doc is now mildly out of date.
findings.recommendation: Optional follow-up: add one line to the Sage decisions doc noting that the final __init__ superset includes the two backends as convenience re-exports. Not blocking.
